CustomField.description: This field is used to group the ownership of the Lead by queue and by user.
CustomField.formula: IF(ISBLANK(Owner:User.Id), IF(Contains(Owner:Queue.QueueName, "LST"), "LST Queue", IF(Contains(Owner:Queue.QueueName, "EH"), "EH Queue", IF(Contains(Owner:Queue.QueueName, "INF"), "INF Queue", "Other Queue"))), Owner:User.FirstName & ' ' & Owner:User.LastName)
CustomField.label: Lead Owner/Queue Name
